hero.title: Spec-First
hero.subtitle: Specification-Driven AI Workflow Engine
hero.description: From requirements to release, a stage state machine drives the full development lifecycle. Every implementation traces back to its specification, with automated compliance checks.

items.title: Stage State Machine
items.description: 8 active stages + 2 terminal states, unidirectional and irreversible, ensuring process discipline.

items.title: Traceability IDs
items.description: 14 ID types covering business chain and V-Model, enabling complete spec-to-implementation traceability.

items.title: Gate Quality Checks
items.description: 19 validation rules (16 blocking + 3 warnings), enforcing quality before stage advancement.

items.title: Skill Orchestration
items.description: 20+ AI-powered Skills covering the entire lifecycle, intelligently guiding development workflows.
